allow:
Bash(python3 -c "
cases = ['qwen2vl', 'qwen3vl', 'qwen2_vl', 'qwen3_vl', 'llava', 'qwen2', 'qwen3', 'gemma3', 'moondream']
for fam in cases:
    old = fam.endswith\('_vl'\) or fam == 'qwen2_vl' or 'llava' in fam or 'vision' in fam or 'intern_vl' in fam or 'minicpm' in fam
    new = \('llava' in fam or 'vision' in fam or fam.endswith\('_vl'\) or fam.endswith\('vl'\)
           or 'intern_vl' in fam or 'minicpm' in fam or 'moondream' in fam or 'phi3v' in fam or 'gemma3' in fam\)
    print\(f'{fam:20s}  old={old}  new={new}'\)
")
Bash(curl -s -L "https://lite.duckduckgo.com/lite/?q=python+language" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(X11; Linux x86_64; rv:120.0\) Gecko/20100101 Firefox/120.0" 2>&1 | head -100)
